Author: itetcu

Log:
  - fix typo
  
  PR:		174743
  Submitted by:	Sayetsky Anton

Modified:
  head/net-im/skype/pkg-message   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net-im/skype/pkg-message
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/skype/pkg-message	Mon Jan 21 18:14:00 2013	(r310778)
+++ head/net-im/skype/pkg-message	Mon Jan 21 18:54:24 2013	(r310779)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ In order for Skype to work OK, you need 
 The port tries to check for this, but there is a smaller or bigger interval for
 which this can't be done automatically. So in case of any trouble please make
 sure you run kernel/modules built from sources after above dates.
-Tests were only done on HEAD and 8-STALBE with linux-fc10, and I don't think it
+Tests were only done on HEAD and 8-STABLE with linux-fc10, and I don't think it
 can work with fc4.
